resolvedQuestions.question: Which skills have latent behaviors that would be more valuable as always-on hooks/plugins?
resolvedQuestions.answer: All 12 skill families inventoried; 18 candidates identified across sk-code, sk-doc, sk-git, sk-design, sk-prompt, system-spec-kit, system-code-graph, system-deep-loop, system-skill-advisor, mcp-code-mode, cli-external

resolvedQuestions.question: Which skills have proven runtime contracts that could be trivially promoted?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Candidates C-1 through C-6, C-15, C-17, C-18 cite existing scripts with proven runtime contracts; C-7 through C-14, C-16 cite existing skill patterns with proven plugin analogues

resolvedQuestions.question: Which OpenCode hook surfaces are currently underused?
resolvedQuestions.answer: tool.execute.after (0 plugins) and tool.register (0 plugins) are entirely unused

resolvedQuestions.question: Which Claude hook surfaces have gaps where skill-derived hooks would add guardrails?
resolvedQuestions.answer: PostToolUse/Write|Edit has only 1 hook (dist freshness); room for 8+ candidates. PreToolUse/Bash has 1 hook (dispatch preflight); room for git-commit guard

resolvedQuestions.question: For each candidate, what is the blast radius (observe/advise vs enforce/block/mutate)?
resolvedQuestions.answer: 17 of 18 candidates are observe/advise (low); 1 is enforce/block fail-open (medium); 0 mutate

keyFindings: tool.execute.after is entirely unused across all 7 existing plugins
tool.register is entirely unused across all 7 existing plugins
PostToolUse/Write|Edit has only 1 hook (dist freshness) but 8+ promotable validation scripts exist
30+ validation scripts in system-spec-kit/scripts/rules/ are CI-only and could benefit from immediate post-write feedback
The unified PostToolUse quality gate (C-15) subsumes 5 other candidates into one hook
The candidate portfolio is 94% observe/advise (17/18), matching the existing plugin architecture's conservative posture

ruledOutDirections.reason: Already covered by mk-deep-loop-guard.js (OpenCode plugin + Claude PreToolUse/Task hook)
Too granular; covered by unified quality gate (C-15)

ruledOutDirections.approach: MCP tooling doctor.sh as SessionStart hooks
